description_long: This is a brown leather ankle boot with a rounded toe and a low-profile, tan rubber sole. The upper is constructed from smooth, slightly matte leather with visible stitching along the side and around the sole, giving it a handcrafted appearance. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with dark brown laces threaded through four pairs of eyelets. The sole is thick and textured, likely providing good grip and durability for urban walking. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter material, possibly suede or fabric, for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the overall condition is clean and unworn.
description: A brown leather ankle boot with a tan rubber sole, criss-cross laces, and visible stitching, appearing new and unworn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth brown leather upper, tan stitched sole, and lacing detail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, criss-cross laces, and symmetrical shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same leather finish and stitching, with the laces partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel, back seam, and the curve of the ankle collar.
